prompt:
A luxurious fantasy trading card illustration in a premium anime gacha style, vertical format with an ornate gilded frame and jewel insets, designed like an ultra-rare character card. The card shows a full-body shrine maiden priestess named カヤ / KAYA standing slightly right of center in an enchanted pink-and-lilac sacred grove with cherry blossoms, glowing lantern light, mist, a small waterfall, and shrine architecture in the background. She is a beautiful elegant young woman with very long flowing soft pink hair, fox ears, and a white fox mask worn tilted on the side of her head, partially obscuring the upper face area with ceremonial styling. Her outfit is an elaborate layered kimono and priestess robe in pink, rose, plum, and gold with intricate embroidery, armored shoulder pieces, braided cords, paper talismans, decorative tassels, and glowing jewel ornaments. She holds an ornate ritual staff topped with rings, charms, ribbons, and multiple large purple crystal orbs. Beside her on the left sits a divine white fox spirit with nine large luminous tails and delicate gold vine-like markings. The whole image is filled with magical sparkles, soft bloom lighting, shimmering particles, and ethereal pink light effects.

The card layout must include exact visible sections and labels. At the top center, a dark plaque with gold trim reads "神異 - Divine Anomaly -". At the top left, a huge gradient rarity mark reads "UR" with 7 gold stars directly below it. On the left side, include 4 stacked black-and-gold attribute panels with icons and bilingual labels: 1) droplet icon, "属性", "水・祈", "WATER + PRAYER"; 2) fox head icon, "守護神", "黄金の蔓の白狐", "Golden Vine White Fox"; 3) praying hands icon, "役割", "祈癒・支援", "Heal Support"; 4) circular sigil icon, "スキル", "祈灯結界", "Prayer Light Barrier". At the bottom center, a large nameplate reads "カヤ / KAYA" and beneath it the subtitle "東の里の巫女 / Priestess of the Eastern Village". Along the bottom edge, include 5 stat panels with icons and values in this exact order: ATK 760, DEF 690, SPD 820, MAG 960, SUP 990.

Use a highly polished collectible-card aesthetic, dense ornamental filigree, engraved gold borders, gemstone corners, dramatic fantasy lighting, ultra-detailed costume design, soft painterly anime rendering, luminous magical atmosphere, and rich pink, gold, ivory, and violet color harmony. The final image should feel like a high-rarity sacred fox oracle card, majestic, mystical, elegant, and premium.
